# uapi_authorized_key (Data Source)

Look up an SSH authorized key by id. The key blob itself is never returned by uapi.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "uapi_authorized_key" "admin" {
  id = "0a1b2c3d4e5f"
}

output "admin_key_type" {
  value = data.uapi_authorized_key.admin.type
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Resource id to look up.

### Read-Only

- `comment` (String) Optional comment (trailing text on the key line).
- `type` (String) SSH key type (e.g. ssh-ed25519, ssh-rsa, ecdsa-sha2-nistp256).
